name: kris-ick-automatic-train-repair
title: Automatic train repair
author: Kristian432 and ickputzdirwech
description: Stops a damaged train, places repair ghosts (fuel, equipment, filters), restores schedule/group when the consist is rebuilt, and restores automatic mode when the job finishes — optionally after refueling. Factorio 2.0 fork of ickputzdirwech's Automatic train repair.
